name: testDeleteInactiveFraudControlAddedToBusinessUnit
description: Remove inactive Fraud control added to Business unit
descriptionHtml: Remove inactive Fraud control added to Business unit

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Remove inactive Fraud control added to Business unit

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Select '0802.061020 company to bend Fraud Control' company using filter
Select 'Business unit 0802.061020' business unit using filter
Verify the success message ‘SUCCESSBusiness unit control was deleted successfully' is displayed
Verify that the business unit control table doesn't include the deleted control
